use_cases: Hero section for poetry or literary websites with immersive 3D storytelling
Animated landing pages for creative portfolios or artistic presentations
Educational content display with rotating cube for spatial visualization
Interactive storytelling interfaces for cultural or historical themes
ai_summary: A 3D animated hero section featuring a rotating cube with multiple faces that can display poem HTML content. The component includes responsive scaling logic, animated gradient effects, and supports custom background and character images. Designed for immersive storytelling experiences on creative, media, and educational platforms.
